framework.name: NIST AI RMF Govern-Map-Measure-Manage
framework.description: Four-function risk management framework (GOVERN, MAP, MEASURE, MANAGE) that prescribes WHAT to measure but never WHEN. No timelines, no cadences, no phase-gate durations. The word 'timeline' doesn't appear. Measurement is described as a continuous obligation with zero temporal benchmarks.
framework.raw_quote: The Framework is intended to be voluntary, rights-preserving, non-sector-specific, and use-case agnostic, providing flexibility to organizations of all sizes

source.title: Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0)
